hooks.command: input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.liquid ]] && shopify theme check "$file" --fail-level error 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.css ]] && npx stylelint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.js ]] && npx eslint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true

input=$(cat) && prompt=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('prompt',''); m=re.match(r'^/(?:shopify-theme-toolkit:)?(clarify|plan|execute|test|code-review|fix|figma|compare|research|understand|liquid-standards|section-standards|css-standards|js-standards|theme-architecture)\b', p); print(m.group(1) if m else '')" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$prompt" ] && skill="$prompt" && user=$(git config user.name 2>/dev/null || echo unknown) && project=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || basename "$(pwd)") && ts=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") && payload=$(SKILL="$skill" USER_NAME="$user" PROJECT="$project" TS="$ts" python3 -c "import json,os; print(json.dumps({'skill':os.environ['SKILL'],'user':os.environ['USER_NAME'],'project':os.environ['PROJECT'],'timestamp':os.environ['TS'],'token':'shopify-theme-toolkit'}))") && curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxBQ90rMnmE-AYkQlaTF1XVretzK2pE2UN9XPgleOVHV-4BYwWaV0esQT6ymtGsjlvD7A/exec' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$payload" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
